review_title: Good CMS with wide feature list
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like the most is Jahia simplicity: it's very easy to deploy and customize. The second important for me advantage is that this solution works great not only for content management but for customers' data too.
cons: I'd like to see more online tutorials and documentation.

review_title: Empowering Exceptional Digital Experiences with User-Friendly Functionality and Strong Support
description: Overall, our experience with Jahia has been highly positive. The platform offers a powerful and robust digital experience solution that has greatly enhanced our organization's capabilities. We have found Jahia to be easy to use, allowing us to efficiently manage our content, create and update pages, and customize the user experience.The user interface of Jahia is intuitive and user-friendly, enabling us to perform necessary tasks and authoring with ease. It provides all the essential features and functionalities that a modern DX platform should have, empowering us to deliver exceptional digital experiences to our users.One aspect that stands out about Jahia is its technical support. The support team at Jahia has consistently demonstrated great knowledge and expertise. They have been responsive to our inquiries and have gone above and beyond to provide assistance beyond our initial support tickets. This level of support has been invaluable in resolving any issues or challenges that arise.While Jahia is an excellent product, one area where we feel it could improve is in the inclusion of more out-of-the-box components. While the platform offers a solid foundation, having a wider range of pre-built components would further enhance our ability to create engaging and feature-rich websites.
author: Niket G.
pros: What we like most about Jahia is its user-friendly interface and ease of use. The platform is designed in a way that allows users with varying levels of expertise to quickly navigate and utilize its features effectively. The simplicity and accessibility of the platform have significantly contributed to our productivity and efficiency. We appreciate how easy it is to perform necessary tasks and authoring activities without requiring extensive technical knowledge. Additionally, the robustness and stability of Jahia are commendable. The platform consistently delivers reliable performance, ensuring smooth operations and minimizing disruptions.In terms of cost-effectiveness, Jahia has proven to be a favorable choice compared to alternative solutions. It provides a comprehensive set of features at a reasonable cost, making it an attractive option for organizations seeking a robust DX platform within their budget.
cons: Documentation and Resources: Although Jahia provides documentation and resources for users, the availability and comprehensiveness of these materials can be enhanced.Out-of-the-Box Components: While Jahia offers a solid foundation, we would appreciate the inclusion of more out-of-the-box components.

review_title: JAHIA 8 : Powerfull tool and contributor friendly
author: Pauline M.
pros: - Easy to use interface for Admins and Contributors- Content oriented and easely multi-langagues - Good built-in modules and fonctionnalities- Good publications workflows- Very good support : efficient and reactive- Easy to customize components (After learning course)
cons: - Tools module isn't very friendly and would need a UX/UI change- Template management interface would also need a UX/UI change- Plateform and fonctionnalities need a lot of learning at firsthand. However, at the end its counterbalanced with wide fonctionnalities and robustness.- Platform can be capricious : errors and difficulties can appear out of nowhere - Not enough documentations and code examples for developpers

review_title: Lightweight but powerful tool with rich features of Content management system.
description: The platform offers a user-friendly interface that enables me to efficiently conduct search engine optimization (SEO) tasks. Its intuitive design and accessible features allow for swift execution of various SEO activities. With this platform, I can easily optimize web content, conduct keyword research, analyze website performance, and implement SEO best practices. This streamlined process saves time and effort, ensuring that I can effectively enhance my website's visibility and search engine rankings.
author: Praveen M.
pros: Content management system (CMS) that enables organizations to create, manage, and publish content efficiently. It provides features like content authoring, versioning, workflow management, and multi-channel publishing, empowering teams to collaborate effectively and deliver consistent content across various touchpoints.
cons: Complexity for non-technical users: Some users with limited technical expertise have found certain aspects of Jahia's interface and configuration to be complex. Simplifying certain functionalities or providing more user-friendly options could benefit non-technical users.Learning curve: Users have noted that there can be a learning curve associated with mastering Jahia's features and capabilities. Improved documentation and additional resources for onboarding and training could help users get up to speed more quickly.

review_title: Great tool for content management
author: Kunal M.
pros: The user interface of this content management system (CMS) is highly appreciated for its exceptional design and user-friendly nature. The platform's ease of usage allows users to effortlessly assemble websites without requiring extensive expertise in the tool. It simplifies the website creation process, enabling individuals without specialized knowledge to build and manage their online presence effectively.
cons: Enhancing the documentation by providing in-depth explanations, step-by-step tutorials, and real-world examples would greatly benefit users in effectively utilizing the platform.Additionally, providing a diverse range of use cases and scenarios would empower users to adapt the platform to their specific requirements

review_title: An optimal solution for your website
description: In short, I am very satisfied with Jahia, I realize that they are still trying to develop and improve, to make Jahia more and more optimized, more features. I look forward to this.Despite the fact that I still encounter issues while working, I appreciate the support from the support team, which ensures that I am always at ease regardless of the situation by quickly resolving issues.
author: Trinh N.
pros: I've been using the jahia platform for nearly two years, and I appreciate the advantages it provides. I like the words "excellence," "friendliness," and "ease of use" for Jahia. Despite the fact that I had never worked in this field before, it made my job easier.Our clients always are pleased with Jahia products.In addition, the support team greatly assists me whenever a problem arises. They were proactive and quickly recognized the issue I mentioned.
cons: I noticed that Jahia still lacks some documents that I can refer to whenever needed.Display and publishing problems sometimes get in the way of my work and I need to contact the support team.

review_title: Powerful CMS
description: Thanks to Jahia I ensure that I can focus on my design role and I don't have to spend time doing content updates as the content people can edit everything really easy
author: Paola P.
pros: Jahia lets you create components that can be used throughout the site, which helps to create pages without needing code experts and also ensures that the brand is consistent through all the pages
cons: Somedays you have to deal with low-performance, but is not a daily problem. I would say is a minimum dislike, for a robust platform.

review_title: Jahia CMS - Easy and Adaptable
author: Snehal P.
pros: I love the user-friendly interface, making content management and customization effortless. It has a robust multi-site management features.
cons: I would prefer a more advance SEO tools with automated metadata management.Also, would like to have better form builder functionalities to create more complex forms.

review_title: A robust and reliable CMS and excellent relationships with the company
author: Aurelie A.
pros: Jahia enables non-IT users to manage their site content autonomously and quickly. Jahia lets you quickly develop components and templates to meet business needs.It's a robust and reliable production platform.
cons: A few bugs and translation problems in the contribution interface are to be deplored. It's a shame not to be able to manage multiple versions of pages and content in general.

review_title: An good CMS system for your business
description: Webmasters are happy with how easily they can contribute and customize their content without asking for the developers' help.
author: Lan L.
pros: The jContent helps manage media efficiency, and the built-in image editor is excellent.
cons: Sometimes, it is hard to write a script to migrate the content from our old platform, there are some risks that we can not overcome and the only option is to migrate them manually.

review_title: Prise en main rapide et facile pour différents publics
description: Facilité et maîtrise rapide des principales fonctionnalités
author: Eric T.
pros: Facilité de prise en main, simplicité, UX et rapidité de la montée en compétences et qualité du support.
cons: Pas assez de fonctionnalités SEO avancées

review_title: Jahia : Une Plateforme d'Expérience Digitale Robuste et Efficace
description: Dans l'ensemble, mon expérience avec Jahia a été positive. Malgré quelques difficultés initiales liées à l'installation et à l'apprentissage du système, l'efficacité de Jahia dans la gestion et la distribution de contenus variés est indéniable. Sa capacité à s'adapter aux besoins en constante évolution de notre organisation a fait de Jahia un élément précieux de notre stratégie de gestion de contenu.
author: Frédérique C.
pros: J'ai particulièrement apprécié l'interface utilisateur intuitive de Jahia, ainsi que sa capacité à gérer une variété de contenus. Son évolutivité est également un atout majeur, une fois le produit maitrisé.
cons: L'installation initiale peut être complexe, nécessitant une certaine expertise technique. De plus, la courbe d'apprentissage pour les utilisateurs non techniques est assez raide.

review_title: solution digitale complète avec un haut niveau de services (support, conseil)
description: Nous utilisons jahia comme CMS et portail afin de personnaliser le contenu pour les différents profils de nos utilisateurs. Nous l'avons utilisé pour 4 sites, deux purement éditoriaux, un pour la marque employeur avec une intégration des offres d'emplois gérées dans une autre solution, et notre portail du vise une présentation et personnalisation de notre offre de service.
author: Franck M.
pros: gestion de contenu et personnalisation de contenus, facilité d'intégration de contenus externes, robustesse et performance de l'architecture (scalable)
cons: apprentissage pour les développeurs assez complexe

review_title: Great DXP for B2C and B2B companies
description: Working with the Jahia team has been great. They were support and very knowledgable throughout the sales and implementation cycles. Implementation was smooth, and the platform worked just like the demos they showed us. I highly recommend Jahia!
author: Jennifer C.
pros: Easy to use the personalization features to create a custom experience for users.
cons: Jahia could provide additional sections for users to round out the documentation.

review_title: Jahia DX : Une Puissance à Maîtriser pour des Expériences Numériques Supérieures !
description: Mon expérience globale avec Jahia DX a été très positive, malgré une courbe d'apprentissage initiale. Ses fonctionnalités puissantes ont grandement amélioré notre gestion de contenu et notre expérience utilisateur.
author: Maxime D.
pros: J'ai apprécié la gestion de contenu robuste, l'intégration fluide d'outils divers et la personnalisation avancée de l'expérience utilisateur avec Jahia DX.
cons: La complexité initiale de l'interface, la variabilité du support technique et le coût potentiellement élevé sont les aspects que j'ai le moins appréciés de Jahia DX.

review_title: Our preferred DXP so far
author: Timothee E.
pros: Jahia DXP's robustness and flexibility were quite impressive. I appreciated its integration with my favorite IDE, which streamlined my development process. Its auto-sync functionality enabled me to witness changes in real-time. A noteworthy feature is the Store, facilitating the sharing of custom components across different sites. These components can be enabled for each site, ensuring their use remains specific to those sites.An additional strength of the platform was its ability to incorporate the organization's user database as an authentication provider
cons: The platform could certainly benefit from better documentation, more specifically, ones that are contextually relevant. Given that it's an enterprise platform, improper documentation or training can lead to subpar deployment, consequently causing system degradation

review_title: recommande
author: Quoc Thai L.
pros: gestion des roles, modification des blocs contenus, soutien multi-language
cons: pas completement optimise sur quelques OS

review_title: Getting started with tool is very easy for smeone who has never used a CMS
author: Olivier D.
pros: This CMS has really simplified this management of our online contant. Its flexibility aloows us to create attractive pages effortlessly even without deep technical skills
cons: the owerall stability of this CMS is acceptable , although there have been situations where i encountered unexcepted errors

review_title: Good DXP with all the key features
author: Dominique F.
pros: Our users could easily learn the software and they liked it
cons: The interface can by crowded in some screens.

review_title: Simple et fonctionnel
author: alice F.
pros: Jahia est un CMS simple et qui propose les fonctionnalités nécessaires pour une prise en main aisée des collaborateurs.
cons: La navigation sur la création d'une page pourrait être plus fluide et plus visuelle.

review_title: Prise en main simple et intuitif
description: En tant que webmaster, je suis amenée à contribuer de plusieurs manières sur Jahia. je crée des pages diverses, des références de contenu, slider, etc. Ce que je trouve intéressant est que je peux aussi bien utiliser le WYSIWYG que coder en html/css.
author: Salima B.
pros: - Facilité d'utilisation, de prise en main - possibilité d'ajouter une couche de CSS; - diversité des templates, des modules - références de contenus simples s'utilisation
cons: - chargements de pages (backoffice) trop long - Fonctionnalités JavaScript pas toujours autorisées dans Jahia

review_title: An Excellent Platform to Host a Website
description: Jahia has been an impressive platform to host a website on. The ability to easily create custom components has allowed us to give content editors the tools they need to be self sufficient while managing many sites. Integrations with third party systems have also been straightforward to implement. This has allowed Jahia to operate as a central hub on more than one project.
author: William L.
pros: Jahia provides a modern interface for content editors. It is easy to develop custom components to aide content editors. There is also plenty of flexibility for integrating with third party platforms to provide logins, billing, reporting, etc via custom rules, actions, and data providers.
cons: There is a learning curve for Jahia. Once you get used to everything being content and how it is stored in the JCR then it is not hard to deal with. Changes to data structures after content is created can be a bit painful though, so the most successful Jahia projects are often the ones with proper planning. The more information that developers know about the use cases, the more likely that they will be able to properly set up custom components and avoid pain points in the future.

review_title: Simple content management and page creation for users of all skill levels.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Jahia stands out for its ability to integrate data from different sources to provide personalised experiences for each user, as well as for its flexibility and ability to adapt to future business growth needs.
cons: Jahia can be complex to use for beginners, due to the large variety of features and modules available. In addition, the cost of Jahia can be higher than other CMS

review_title: Jahia est un gestionnaire de contenu orienté contributeur
description: Jahia nous permet au quotidien d'être très réactif sur la gestion de nos contenus web. Il permet aux développeurs de proposer une interface spécifiques pour les contributeurs.
author: Anna C.
pros: Le CMS demande un petit temps de prie en main mais est très facile d'utilisation une fois la logique acquise.
cons: Les fonctionnalités de personnalisation et AB Test ne sont pas assez mûres et ont bien souvent été difficile à implémenter dans l'outil tel qu'il a été mis en place dans notre groupe.

review_title: Comparable to others in the market in terms of ease of use and features
description: Jahia has enabled us to roll out new webpages a lot faster than our previous CMS allowing us to deliver relevant content to users and grow our audience.
author: Claire B.
pros: Jahia was easy to learn for the entire team and has made managing web content far easier than our old CMS. Page templates and pre-built components make building pages a lot quicker and accessible to those without HTML knowledge.
cons: The internal search could show the most relevant result first as it does not currently appear to do that.
